scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.test: npm test -w backend && npm test -w frontend
scripts.db:reset: cd backend/db && docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && cd ../.. && sleep 5 && npm run migrate -w backend && npm run seed -w backend
scripts.db:reset:prod: cd backend/db && docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && cd ../.. && sleep 5 && npm run migrate -w backend && npm run seed:production -w backend
